About Me

Designing &
Building the web

I'm a dedicated web designer and full-stack developer based in Nairobi, with proven expertise across frontend and backend technologies. I build digital solutions that are as functional as they are beautiful.

My background spans Shopify development, ERP systems, responsive web apps, and UI/UX design, always with a sharp focus on performance, security, and clean architecture.
